# Q2 2024 Digital Trust Index: AI-Fueled Fraud

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Artificial intelligence (AI) has rapidly emerged as one of the most transformative technologies of our time, reshaping the internet and the global economy. As AI’s capabilities expand, it’s caught the eye of fraudsters looking to exploit its potential for their own illicit gain.

Get exclusive intel from digital professionals and consumers, and explore fraud data insights from across Sift’s Global Network.
